detail.description:
Cats & Soup: Magic Recipe is officially out now! ✨
The purr-fectly awaited official sequel to Cats & Soup has finally arrived!

To celebrate the official launch, we're gifting everyone two limited cats: the sweet Calico Latte cat and the lovely Cherry Blossom Shorthair! 🐱🌸

Embark on a magical merge adventure with adorable kitties today!🐾

Merge ingredients to whip up magical recipes, and decorate a cozy Share House for your feline friends!


Are you ready to dive into one of the cutest cat g
detail.recentChanges:
《Cats & Soup : Magic Recipe》Official Launch!

A Major Magical Update Has Arrived!
- New story scenes and charming NPC cutscenes
- Multi-quest system for more engaging gameplay
- A brand-new sticker collection event with customization
- Renewed weekly missions

Dive into a more magical journey than ever before!
